title: Agent File Frontmatter Schema
description: Frontmatter schema for .agent.md files per VS Code custom agent specification

agents.description: Fixed allowlist of subagent names this agent may invoke. Omit the field for unrestricted subagent access; use an explicit array, including an empty array, for a fixed set.

description.description: A brief description of the custom agent, shown as placeholder text in the chat input field

name.description: The human-readable dispatch and display name of the custom agent

argument-hint.description: Optional hint text shown in the chat input field to guide users on how to interact with the custom agent

tools.description: A list of tool or tool set names available for this custom agent. Can include built-in tools, tool sets, MCP tools, or tools contributed by extensions

model.description: Optional exact ordered High, Medium, or Low three-model profile. Order is availability fallback within the responsibility-selected profile. An omitted subagent model inherits the invoking parent model; an omitted directly invoked agent model uses the current session selection.

target.description: The target environment or context for the custom agent

mcp-servers.description: Optional list of Model Context Protocol (MCP) server config json to use with custom agents in GitHub Copilot

user-invocable.description: Controls whether the agent appears in the UI for manual invocation.

disable-model-invocation.description: When true, prevents other agents from invoking this agent as a subagent. It does not prevent this agent from invoking agents allowed by its agents and tools fields.

label.description: The display text shown on the handoff button

agent.description: The target agent's human-readable frontmatter name

prompt.description: The prompt text to send to the target agent

model.description: Optional model override for the handoff.

send.description: Optional boolean flag to auto-submit the prompt (default is false)

handoffs.description: Optional list of suggested next actions or prompts to transition between custom agents
